Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Steps for the process common to both models 1 Receive application Resume submission and questionnaire ReceiveApplication 2 Loop for data completeness DataCompletenessCheck automated check If incomplete then RequestMoreInfo and then go back to DataCompletenessCheck This is a loop until the data is complete 3 Skill assessment SkillAssessment 4 Cultural fit and community affiliation check This is where the two models differ 5 Managerial review ManagerialReview 6 Final decision FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the first model with potential unfairness After SkillAssessment we have an XOR branch One branch CulturalFitCheck standard cultural fit evaluation The other branch CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives a subtle advantage to those with community affiliations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the second model without unfairness We remove the XOR branch and replace it with a single CulturalFitCheck for everyone

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can model this as Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Meaning do DataCompletenessCheck then either exit the loop or do RequestMoreInfo and then again DataCompletenessCheck until exit

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The order ReceiveApplication to loop loop DataCompletenessCheck to XOR between RequestMoreInfo and exit So the loop node will be LOOP DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Then from the loop to SkillAssessment Then from SkillAssessment to the XOR node which is XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Then from the XOR node to ManagerialReview Then ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Steps for Model 1 A Transition label ReceiveApplication B DataCompletenessCheck C RequestMoreInfo D SkillAssessment E CulturalFitCheck F CommunityAffiliationCheck G ManagerialReview H FinalDecision loop OperatorPOWL operator LOOP children B C xor OperatorPOWL operator XOR children E F root StrictPartialOrder nodes A loop D xor G H root order add edge A loop loop D D xor xor G G H

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Steps for Model 2 A ReceiveApplication B DataCompletenessCheck C RequestMoreInfo D SkillAssessment E CulturalFitCheck G ManagerialReview H FinalDecision loop OperatorPOWL operator LOOP children B C root StrictPartialOrder nodes A loop D E G H root order add edge A loop loop D D E E G G H
